india_trends.title: Gold, silver may face selling pressure as Fed meeting, US-Iran talks loom: Analysts
india_trends.summary: Gold and silver may face some selling pressure this holiday-shortened week as traders track peace talks between the US and Iran, crude oil rates and the Federal Reserve's policy decision, analysts said.

india_trends.title: State-owned AIESL eyes more international biz, enhanced servicing capabilities at its Nagpur MRO facility
india_trends.summary: AIESL, a state-owned MRO provider, is expanding its Nagpur facility. The company seeks to serve more international airlines and is pursuing EASA approval for Airbus base maintenance. A recent success involved reviving an Air India Boeing 777 after six years. AIESL is also exploring passenger-to-frei

india_trends.title: WGC proposes physically-backed common infrastructure to scale digital gold
india_trends.summary: The World Gold Council (WGC) has proposed an initiative to build a physically-backed shared infrastructure to advance the growth of digital gold.

india_trends.title: IPO calendar: Which new issues and listings will hit the market this week?
india_trends.summary: The primary market anticipates a quiet week with no mainboard IPOs. Investor focus shifts to SME platforms, featuring one new IPO and several listings. This activity occurs against a backdrop of market downturns and rising oil prices. Amba Auto Sales & Services IPO opens soon. Adisoft Technologi

india_trends.title: India denies RTI on Russia oil import data, cites strategic and commercial confidentiality
india_trends.summary: Information on Russian oil imports to India is being withheld. The Petroleum Planning and Analysis Cell cited commercial and confidential reasons. The Central Information Commission supported this, citing strategic and economic interests. Details of crude oil imports between June 2022 and June 2025

india_trends.title: Survival Over Hype: The hidden trait that builds long-term wealth
india_trends.summary: Global markets face inflation and uncertainty. Veteran investor Thomas Russo suggests true company survivors possess a 'capacity to suffer'. These businesses reinvest for future growth, even if it means sacrificing immediate profits. Investors must also develop this resilience, holding quality compa

india_trends.title: New Zealand to sign FTA with India tomorrow; Luxon calls it ‘once-in-a-generation deal’
india_trends.summary: New Zealand Prime Minister Christopher Luxon announced a Free Trade Agreement with India will be signed Monday. This landmark deal opens one of the world's largest markets to New Zealand exporters. The agreement provides unprecedented access to India's 1.4 billion people and its fast-growing economy

india_trends.title: Why should investors approach a 'buy on dips' strategy amid earnings season? Explained
india_trends.summary: Earnings performance in the IT and banking sectors has been mixed. The IT sector has faced headwinds, with the index declining amid cautious management commentary and conservative FY27 guidance.

india_trends.title: TCS vs Infosys vs Wipro vs HCL Tech vs Tech Mahindra: Which IT stock to buy after Q4 results 2026?
india_trends.summary: IT sector has remained in focus amid uncertain global demand, pricing challenges, and the transformative influence of artificial intelligence (AI) continue to reshape its growth outlook. Here's what experts recommended on IT sector stocks.

india_trends.title: CP Milk & Food Products in early talks to sell up to 15% at ₹3,000 crore valuation
india_trends.summary: CP Milk’s fundraising efforts come against the backdrop of several family-owned businesses seeking to tap private markets to catalyze their next phase of growth

india_trends.title: NTPC exploring 2 nuclear power units of 1,400 MW in Banka district of Bihar
india_trends.summary: State-owned NTPC is planning two 700 MW nuclear units in Bihar's Banka district. This project could involve an investment of Rs 25,000 crore. NTPC officials are currently conducting a feasibility study. The Bihar government has assured full support. This move aligns with India's ambition for 100 GW

india_trends.title: Market Trading Guide: Buy Aster DM, AU SFB on Monday for up to 8% near-term gains
india_trends.summary: Decoding the charts, Rupak De, Senior Technical Analyst at LKP Securities, said the index faced resistance near its 100-day EMA on the daily chart, which capped the rally and triggered fresh selling, dragging it below the 24,000 mark.

india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: Precious metals remain volatile amid US-Iran war. Is it right time to buy?
india_trends.summary: Gold and silver prices have remained under pressure since the beginning of US-Iran war. Here's what experts say on gold and silver prices outlook, along with buying recommendation.

india_trends.title: DMRC appoints Sanjay Jamuar as first CEO for global arm DMIL; aims to scale overseas metro projects
india_trends.summary: DMIL CEO: Delhi Metro Rail Corporation has launched Delhi Metro International Limited. Sanjay Jamuar is its first Chief Executive Officer. This new arm will manage metro projects and operations outside Delhi and in foreign countries. DMIL will offer advisory services for transit systems. It builds o

india_trends.title: FTA with New Zealand to provide huge opportunities for Agra's leather exporters: Goyal
india_trends.summary: India and New Zealand are set to sign a free trade agreement on April 27. This pact will significantly boost bilateral trade. Indian companies, especially leather exporters from Agra, will gain duty-free access to New Zealand markets. The agreement aims to double trade and attract substantial invest

india_trends.title: Finance Ministry asks PSBs to complete wage revision process in next 12 months
india_trends.summary: Public sector banks must begin wage revision talks for employees and officers. Negotiations for the 13th Bi-partite settlement are to be finalised within a year. This wage revision is due from November 1, 2027. The government emphasises timely conclusion to maintain industrial harmony.

india_trends.title: 7 of top 10 most-valued firms lose Rs 2 lakh crore in market cap; TCS top laggard
india_trends.summary: The combined market valuation of seven of the top-10 most-valued firms eroded by Rs 2 lakh crore last week, with Tata Consultancy Services and Reliance Industries emerging as the biggest laggards, in-tandem with a bearish trend in equities.

india_trends.title: Reliance navigates volatile oil markets with agile sourcing, operational tweaks
india_trends.summary: Reliance Industries navigated a volatile energy market in FY26 by diversifying crude sourcing and maintaining operational agility. The company replaced disrupted Persian Gulf contracts and worked on alternative routes for stranded crude, ensuring refinery operations were sustained amidst geopolitica
